# ebhelper_asg_health_check

Configures the health check type and grace period on an EB-managed Auto Scaling Group. On destroy, resets to EC2 health check with 300s grace period.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "ebhelper_asg_health_check" "app" {
  asg_name                  = ebhelper_environment_info.app.asg_name
  health_check_type         = "ELB"
  health_check_grace_period = 300
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `asg_name` (String) Name of the Auto Scaling Group. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `health_check_type` (String) Health check type: `EC2` or `ELB`.

### Optional

- `health_check_grace_period` (Number) Health check grace period in seconds. Default: `300`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier (ASG name).
